messages.content: For every year of EA's NHL video game franchise, if there were in-game commentators, list who they were.

Here is a list of the in-game commentators for each year of EA's NHL video game franchise:

1. NHL Hockey '94 (Sega Genesis and Super Nintendo): Ron Barr
2. NHL 95 (Sega Genesis and Super Nintendo): Ron Barr
3. NHL 96 (Sega Genesis and Super Nintendo): Ron Barr
4. NHL 97 (Sega Genesis and Super Nintendo): Ron Barr
5. NHL 98 (Sega Genesis and Super Nintendo): Ron Barr
6. NHL 99 (PlayStation and PC): Jim Hughson, Bill Clement
7. NHL 2000 (PlayStation and PC): Jim Hughson, Don Taylor
8. NHL 2001 (PlayStation and PC): Jim Hughson, Don Taylor, Don Cherry
9. NHL 2002 (PlayStation 2 and Xbox): Jim Hughson, Don Taylor, Don Cherry
10. NHL 2003 (PlayStation 2, Xbox, and GameCube): Jim Hughson, Don Taylor, Don Cherry
11. NHL 2004 (PlayStation 2, Xbox, and GameCube): Jim Hughson, Craig Simpson, Don Taylor, Don Cherry
12. NHL 2005 (PlayStation 2, Xbox, and GameCube): Jim Hughson, Craig Simpson
13. NHL 06 (PlayStation 2, Xbox, and GameCube): Jim Hughson, Craig Simpson
14. NHL 07 (PlayStation 2, Xbox, and GameCube): Gary Thorne, Bill Clement
15. NHL 08 (PlayStation 3, Xbox 360, and PlayStation 2): Gary Thorne, Bill Clement
16. NHL 09 (PlayStation 3, Xbox 360, and PlayStation 2): Gary Thorne, Bill Clement
17. NHL 10 (PlayStation 3, Xbox 360, and PlayStation 2): Gary Thorne, Bill Clement
18. NHL 11 (PlayStation 3, Xbox 360): Gary Thorne, Bill Clement
19. NHL 12 (PlayStation 3, Xbox 360): Gary Thorne, Bill Clement
20. NHL 13 (PlayStation 3, Xbox 360): Gary Thorne, Bill Clement
21. NHL 14 (PlayStation 3, Xbox 360): Gary Thorne, Bill Clement
22. NHL 15 (PlayStation 4, Xbox One): Mike 'Doc' Emrick, Eddie Olczyk, Ray Ferraro
23. NHL 16 (PlayStation 4, Xbox One): Mike 'Doc' Emrick, Eddie Olczyk, Ray Ferraro
24. NHL 17 (PlayStation 4, Xbox One): Mike 'Doc' Emrick, Eddie Olczyk, Ray Ferraro
25. NHL 18 (PlayStation 4, Xbox One): Mike 'Doc' Emrick, Eddie Olczyk, Ray Ferraro
26. NHL 19 (PlayStation 4, Xbox One): Mike 'Doc' Emrick, Eddie Olczyk, Ray Ferraro
27. NHL 20 (PlayStation 4, Xbox One): Mike 'Doc' Emrick, Eddie Olczyk, Ray Ferraro
28. NHL 21 (PlayStation 4, Xbox One): Mike 'Doc' Emrick, Eddie Olczyk, Ray Ferraro

Please note that there might be variations in the commentary teams depending on the version of the game and the gaming platform.
Did Cole and Neale every commentate one?

In the EA NHL video game franchise, play-by-play commentator Bob Cole and color commentator Greg Neale have not been featured as the primary commentators. The primary commentators throughout the years have mainly included Jim Hughson, Gary Thorne, and Mike 'Doc' Emrick, along with various color commentators such as Bill Clement, Craig Simpson, Eddie Olczyk, and Ray Ferraro. Bob Cole and Greg Neale have not been part of the primary commentary teams in the NHL video game franchise.

Apologies for the confusion. You are correct, the color commentator I referred to as Greg Neale should have been Harry Neale, known for his work alongside Bob Cole in NHL broadcasts. However, Bob Cole and Harry Neale did not serve as the primary commentators in the EA NHL video game franchise. The primary commentary teams in the game series have typically included Jim Hughson, Gary Thorne, and Mike 'Doc' Emrick, as mentioned earlier.
Have they commentated other games? I read someone say they did, but I didn't think so.

Bob Cole and Harry Neale have indeed provided commentary for NHL video games, but not as the primary commentators in the EA NHL video game franchise. They were featured as guest commentators in NHL 2K6 and NHL 2K7, which are part of the competing NHL video game series developed by 2K Sports. Bob Cole and Harry Neale lent their voices to those particular games, providing unique commentary for a different gaming experience. However, in the EA NHL series, they have not served as the primary commentators.
Ok give me a list of commentators by year for the 2K series of NHL games

While I couldn't find an exhaustive list of commentators for the 2K series of NHL games for every year, here are some notable commentators who have participated in the series:

1. NHL 2K (2000): Kenny Albert, Don Taylor
2. NHL 2K2 (2002): Chris Simpson
3. NHL 2K3 (2002): Bob Cole, Harry Neale, Phil Simon
4. NHL 2K6 (2005): Bob Cole, Harry Neale
5. NHL 2K7 (2006): Bob Cole, Harry Neale
6. NHL 2K8 (2007): Randy Hahn, Drew Remenda
7. NHL 2K9 (2008): Randy Hahn, Drew Remenda
8. NHL 2K10 (2009): Randy Hahn, Drew Remenda
9. NHL 2K11 (2010): Randy Hahn, Drew Remenda
10. NHL 2K12 (2011): Randy Hahn, Drew Remenda

I hope this information helps!
Do these 2K games have drafting and trading and franchise modes?

Yes, the 2K series of NHL games feature various game modes, including drafting, trading, and franchise modes. These modes allow players to manage their own team, make trades, sign free agents, and participate in player drafts. The exact features and depth of these modes may vary from game to game within the 2K series, but overall, they provide an immersive experience for players to take control of their favorite NHL team and guide them to success.
I was trying to remember which game I played before with these features and I'm not sure which one

The NHL 2K series has been known to include franchise modes, trading, and drafting. However, without more specific information, it may be difficult to determine which exact game you played. If you can provide any additional details or features you remember from the game, I can try to assist you further in identifying the specific title you are thinking of.
It had cole and neale and drafting and trading through multiple seasons

Based on your description of having Bob Cole and Harry Neale as commentators and featuring drafting and trading through multiple seasons, the game you are likely referring to is "NHL 2K3." This particular entry in the NHL 2K series included the Franchise mode where players could draft and trade players over several seasons, while also featuring the commentary of Bob Cole and Harry Neale.

Apologies for the confusion earlier. You are correct that the NHL 2K6 and NHL 2K7 games also featured Bob Cole and Harry Neale as commentators. Both of these games included franchise modes where players could participate in drafting and trading over multiple seasons. These modes allowed players to manage their team, make trades, and guide their franchise to success. NHL 2K6 and NHL 2K7 are notable for their inclusion of the commentary duo, Bob Cole and Harry Neale, adding an authentic broadcast feel to the games.
